title: DeepSeek Review Receipt
description: Schema for Ollama-compatible DeepSeek review receipts emitted by 5-Applications/tools-scripts/llm/ollama_deepseek_review_emitter.py. Receipts are paired with a sibling markdown answer file and pin the exact model, endpoint, token usage, and SHA-256 hashes needed to re-validate the review without re-running the model. See 6-Documentation/wiki/DeepSeek-Review-Process.md for the human-readable contract.

sha256Hash.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest prefixed with the literal 'sha256:'.

endpoint.description: API endpoint that served the review (e.g. https://ollama.com/v1/chat/completions).

repoRelativePath.description: Repo-relative POSIX path (must not start with '/').

usage.description: Token usage as reported by the endpoint.

primaryReceipt.description: Primary review receipt: written first, pins context files used to build the prompt.

context_files.description: Repo-relative paths to every file that participated in the review prompt context.

answer_path.description: Repo-relative path to the answer markdown.

continuationReceipt.description: Continuation receipt: emitted when a primary review was truncated and was continued by a separate request.

previous_answer_path.description: Repo-relative path to the answer being continued.

answer_path.description: Repo-relative path to the answer markdown produced by this continuation.

message_keys.description: Field names returned alongside 'content' by the continuation endpoint (e.g. role, content, reasoning).
